title: decaspermum nivale
intro: Decaspermum nivale, also known as the Cloud Tree, is a species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Papua New Guinea. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily derived from its bark, which has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. Decaspermum nivale is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the bark is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
